nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: Hmph, another person who doesn't know their place. I am Murong Fu of the Gusu Murong family. What brings you here?

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: Years ago, I also challenged the Zhenlong Go puzzle. Though I couldn't solve it, I still gained something. Have you also come for that puzzle?

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: The Murong family has its own insights into Go. If you wish, we may play a game.

options.text: Please teach me, Young Master Murong!
Young Master Murong, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: In Go, I emphasize reading intent and responding with the right countermeasure.

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: When you see through a plan, you can shift and counter to seize the initiative.

options.text: Brilliant! Please teach me, Young Master Murong

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: Very well. However, this supreme technique of mine isn't for just anyone. If you want to learn, you must first prove you're qualified.

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: Though I couldn't solve Zhenlong, my Go skill is not to be underestimated. If you can beat me, it proves you have the aptitude.

options.text: Please bestow your teaching, Young Master Murong!

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: Hmph! Let you witness the power of Gusu Murong!

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: Hmph, your level isn't enough. Go practice more and don't waste my time.

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: I have only one goal in this life - to restore Great Yan. For this goal, I can sacrifice everything.

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: The same goes for Go - have a clear goal, then give it your all. People without goals will never succeed.

options.text: Young Master Murong has lofty ambitions!

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: Hmph, come back when you're ready. I don't have time to wait for you.

nodes.speaker: Murong Fu
nodes.text: Go now. I have important matters to attend to.
